title: PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY - 211info
text: FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER PARENTING CLASSES AND RESOURCE LIBRARY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides two active parenting series each year. Also offers multiple parent-child playgroup and workshop opportunities, including divorce education and prenatal classes. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 575-1006 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-1006 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Parenting Materials Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - GRANT COUNTY LACTATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN IN BETWEEN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON AND PARENTS AS TEACHERS PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
